title: aquilegia vulgaris var. mollis
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris var. mollis, commonly known as the Columbine, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it a useful treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Aquilegia vulgaris var. mollis include treating respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds, as well as alleviating menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
